picks.match: Newcastle United vs West Ham United
picks.reasoning: Newcastle are dominant at St James' Park and are currently pushing hard for European qualification in these final matchweeks. West Ham's away form has been patchy, and they lack the defensive cohesion to withstand the intense pressing game Newcastle employs at home.

Real Sociedad are notoriously disciplined at home and excel at controlling the tempo against mid-table sides like Valencia. With Valencia safe from relegation but out of European contention, Sociedad's motivation to secure their own continental spot will be the deciding factor.
